operations.name: add_link
operations.description: Create a typed link between two pages in the knowledge graph. Use to connect entities and technical concepts: people/companies (invested_in, works_at, founded), or systems/concepts (implements, depends_on, extends, contradicts, layer_of, prerequisite_for). Links are bidirectional in traversal and power cross-system navigation.

link_type.description: Link type. People/deal: invested_in, works_at, founded, mentioned_in. Technical: implements, depends_on, extends, contradicts, layer_of, prerequisite_for. Free-text; no allowlist enforced.

operations.name: add_tag
operations.description: Add tag to page

operations.name: add_timeline_entry
operations.description: Add timeline entry to a page

operations.name: advance_memory_candidate_status
operations.description: Advance one memory-inbox candidate through the bounded early review lifecycle.

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

next_status.description: Next allowed candidate status; the exact transition still depends on the current stored status.

review_reason.description: Optional review reason or audit note

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for review metadata

operations.name: apply_memory_patch_candidate
operations.description: Apply an approved page merge patch candidate after rechecking the target snapshot hash.

realm_id.description: Active memory realm id attached read-write to the session

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for apply metadata

risk_acknowledged.description: Required true when applying high or critical risk patch candidates

source_refs.description: Required provenance strings for the apply decision

operations.name: apply_memory_redaction_plan
operations.description: Apply an approved memory redaction plan to supported page text fields.

operations.name: approve_canonical_target_proposal
operations.description: Approve a proposal and bind or stage a missing-page stub.

operations.name: approve_memory_redaction_plan
operations.description: Approve a draft memory redaction plan for application.

operations.name: assess_historical_validity
operations.description: Assess whether a handed-off promoted candidate still represents current evidence for canonical consolidation.

now.description: Optional ISO datetime used for deterministic review-window checks.

operations.name: attach_memory_realm_to_session
operations.description: Attach a memory realm to a memory session with read-only or read-write access.

source_refs.description: Optional provenance reference string or string array for the ledger event.

operations.name: audit_brain_loop
operations.description: Audit whether the brain-agent loop executed in a window.

json.description: Accepted for CLI parity; operation always returns structured data.

since.description: ISO timestamp or relative window such as 24h or 7d. Default: now-24h.

operations.name: bind_memory_candidate_target
operations.description: Bind an unresolved candidate through an approved proposal.

operations.name: build_context_atlas
operations.description: Build or rebuild the persisted workspace atlas registry entry.

operations.name: build_context_map
operations.description: Build or rebuild the persisted structural workspace context map.

operations.name: build_session_grant_policy_input
operations.description: Build policy input from a Phase 03 session_grant record.

requested_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for active/expired evaluation.

operations.name: capture_agent_session_memory
operations.description: Capture deterministic agent session memory and apply governed writeback when requested.

apply.description: Apply governed writeback for capture when dry-run is false.

dry_run.description: Preview capture without mutating memory when the CLI maps this flag into the operation context.

events.description: Agent session events as objects, or a JSON array string.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp used for deterministic capture ids.

repo_path.description: Optional repository path associated with the session.

workspace_id.description: Optional workspace id associated with the session.

operations.name: capture_map_derived_candidates
operations.description: Capture context-map recommended reads as bounded inbox candidates without mutating canonical notes.

limit.description: Optional smaller capture limit; defaults to the report read limit

scope_id.description: Optional scope id when selecting the default map (default: workspace:default)

operations.name: classify_memory_scenario
operations.description: Classify a memory request into a scenario before retrieval.

known_subjects.description: Optional detected subject refs as strings or objects with ref and kind, or a JSON array string

query.description: Raw user request or system task

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for scenario classification. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

operations.name: close_memory_session
operations.description: Close an active memory session if it exists.

source_refs.description: Optional provenance reference string or string array for the ledger event.

operations.name: complete_canonical_target_proposal_binding
operations.description: Complete binding for an approved or patch-staged proposal.

operations.name: create_canonical_target_proposal
operations.description: Draft or write a canonical target proposal for a targetless candidate.

apply.description: Write the proposal row when true. Defaults to false.

operations.name: create_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Create one canonical memory-inbox candidate in captured state by default.

id.description: Optional memory candidate id (generated when omitted)

include_duplicate_review.description: Include a duplicate review result with the created candidate

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

proposed_content.description: Candidate claim or proposed change content

review_reason.description: Optional review reason or audit note

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for review metadata

source_refs.description: Optional provenance strings for multi-source attribution

operations.name: create_memory_patch_candidate
operations.description: Stage a reviewable patch candidate in the Memory Inbox without applying the patch to canonical memory.

base_target_snapshot_hash.description: Target snapshot hash observed before staging the patch; null only when the target is intentionally absent

expected_resulting_target_snapshot_hash.description: Optional expected target snapshot hash after applying the patch

id.description: Optional memory candidate id (generated when omitted)

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

patch_body.description: Structured patch body to review later; json_patch accepts an RFC 6902 operation array.

proposed_content.description: Review queue summary for this patch candidate

provenance_summary.description: Optional human-readable provenance summary for reviewers

realm_id.description: Active memory realm id attached read-write to the session

target_id.description: Canonical memory target id for the proposed patch

target_kind.description: Canonical memory target kind for the proposed patch

operations.name: create_memory_redaction_plan
operations.description: Create a draft redaction plan and planned page redaction items for matching page text.

operations.name: create_memory_session
operations.description: Create an active memory session for attaching scoped memory realms.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp after which the session is effectively expired.

source_refs.description: Optional provenance reference string or string array for the ledger event.

operations.name: delete_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Delete one memory-inbox candidate by id.

operations.name: delete_page
operations.description: Delete a page

operations.name: delete_personal_episode_entry
operations.description: Delete one canonical personal-episode entry by id.

operations.name: delete_profile_memory_entry
operations.description: Delete one canonical profile-memory entry by id.

operations.name: dry_run_memory_mutation
operations.description: Validate whether a durable memory mutation would be allowed, including session/realm policy and target snapshot hash checks, and record the validation result in the mutation ledger.

dry_run.description: Preview validation without writing a ledger event.

operations.name: evaluate_raw_access
operations.description: Evaluate and audit a scoped raw source chunk access request.

actor_type.description: Actor type, for example runner, daemon, mcp, cli, or llm.

input.description: Optional input text to hash in the ledger.

policy.description: Deprecated dry-run-only raw access policy override. Non-dry-run evaluation resolves policy from the registered source.

prompt.description: Optional prompt text to hash in the ledger.

reason.description: Why raw chunk access is needed.

operations.name: evaluate_scope_gate
operations.description: Evaluate the deterministic scope gate for the current published retrieval stack.

episode_title.description: Optional personal episode title used for signal detection

intent.description: One of task_resume, broad_synthesis, precision_lookup, mixed_scope_bridge, personal_profile_lookup, personal_episode_lookup

query.description: Optional plain-text request used for signal detection

repo_path.description: Optional repo path or file path used for work-signal detection

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for scope-gate evaluation. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

subject.description: Optional personal profile subject used for signal detection

task_id.description: Task id used to derive task scope when present

operations.name: evaluate_session_source_grant
operations.description: Evaluate a Phase 03 session_source_grant against a raw source access request.

operations.name: evaluate_session_write_grant
operations.description: Evaluate a Phase 03 session_write_grant against a write policy request.

operations.name: explain_assertion
operations.description: Explain Phase 12 assertion audit lineage from source chunks to claims, evidence, canonical writes, and projections.

include_raw.description: Include raw chunk text only for non-secret, non-injection source chunks.

limit.description: Maximum assertions to explain when using target_slug.

scope_id.description: Assertion lineage scope id. Defaults to workspace:default.

target_slug.description: Target slug whose assertions should be explained when assertion_id is omitted.

operations.name: explain_projection
operations.description: Explain Phase 12 projection audit lineage from projection target back to assertions, claims, and source chunks.

include_raw.description: Include raw chunk text only for non-secret, non-injection source chunks.

limit.description: Maximum projections to explain when using target_type/target_id.

projection_target_id.description: Canonical projection target id to explain.

target_id.description: Projection target_id when projection_target_id is omitted.

target_type.description: Projection target_type when projection_target_id is omitted.

operations.name: file_list
operations.description: List stored files

operations.name: file_upload
operations.description: Upload a file to storage

operations.name: file_url
operations.description: Get a URL for a stored file

expires_in_seconds.description: Signed URL TTL in seconds when cloud storage is configured.

operations.name: find_context_map_path
operations.description: Find a bounded structural path inside one persisted context map.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: find_note_structural_path
operations.description: Find a bounded deterministic structural path between two nodes.

operations.name: get_atlas_orientation_bundle
operations.description: Render a compact atlas bundle from atlas report and atlas orientation card.

allow_stale.description: Allow stale atlas entries when atlas_id is omitted

atlas_id.description: Optional atlas entry id for a direct read

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter when atlas_id is omitted

max_budget_hint.description: Optional maximum allowed budget hint for selection

operations.name: get_atlas_orientation_card
operations.description: Render a compact orientation card from atlas selection and the workspace corpus card.

allow_stale.description: Allow stale atlas entries when atlas_id is omitted

atlas_id.description: Optional atlas entry id for a direct read

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter when atlas_id is omitted

max_budget_hint.description: Optional maximum allowed budget hint for selection

operations.name: get_backlinks
operations.description: List incoming links to a page

operations.name: get_broad_synthesis_route
operations.description: Compose report, structural query, and optional explain into one bounded broad-synthesis route.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

limit.description: Max matched nodes to inspect while composing the route (default 5)

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: get_chunks
operations.description: Get content chunks for a page

operations.name: get_context_atlas_entry
operations.description: Get one persisted atlas registry entry by id.

operations.name: get_context_atlas_overview
operations.description: Render a compact overview artifact for a persisted atlas entry.

allow_stale.description: Allow stale atlas entries when atlas_id is omitted

atlas_id.description: Optional atlas entry id for a direct read

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter when atlas_id is omitted

max_budget_hint.description: Optional maximum allowed budget hint for selection

operations.name: get_context_atlas_report
operations.description: Render a compact human-readable report for a persisted atlas entry.

allow_stale.description: Allow stale atlas entries when atlas_id is omitted

atlas_id.description: Optional atlas entry id for a direct read

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter when atlas_id is omitted

max_budget_hint.description: Optional maximum allowed budget hint for selection

operations.name: get_context_map_entry
operations.description: Get one persisted structural context map by id.

operations.name: get_context_map_explanation
operations.description: Render a bounded local explanation for one node inside a persisted context map.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

node_id.description: Exact structural node id to explain

operations.name: get_context_map_report
operations.description: Render a compact human-readable report for a persisted context map.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: get_health
operations.description: Brain health dashboard (embed coverage, stale pages, orphans)

operations.name: get_ingest_log
operations.description: Get recent ingestion log entries

operations.name: get_lifecycle_forgetting_report
operations.description: Return the Phase 08 lifecycle forgetting audit report for one scope.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic reports.

scope_id.description: Lifecycle scope id; defaults to workspace:default.

operations.name: get_links
operations.description: List outgoing links from a page

operations.name: get_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Get one canonical memory-inbox candidate by id.

operations.name: get_memory_operations_health
operations.description: Return a scoped health report for Phase 9 memory operations control-plane state.

limit.description: Maximum rows sampled from each underlying control-plane list.

operations.name: get_memory_realm
operations.description: Get one memory realm by id.

operations.name: get_memory_redaction_plan
operations.description: Get one memory redaction plan by id.

operations.name: get_memory_session
operations.description: Get one memory session by id, returning effective expired status when expires_at has elapsed.

operations.name: get_mixed_scope_bridge
operations.description: Resolve the published explicit mixed-scope bridge across one work route and one personal route.

episode_source_kind.description: Optional exact personal episode source kind filter

episode_title.description: Exact personal episode title for the personal-side episode route

kind.description: Optional map kind filter for the work-side route

map_id.description: Optional context map id for the work-side broad synthesis route

personal_route_kind.description: Personal-side route kind for the bridge

profile_type.description: Optional exact personal profile-memory type filter

requested_scope.description: Access scope override; must be mixed for this route. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

scope_id.description: Work-side scope id for broad synthesis (default: workspace:default)

subject.description: Exact personal profile subject for the personal-side profile route

operations.name: get_mixed_scope_disclosure
operations.description: Project a resolved mixed-scope bridge into a visibility-safe disclosure artifact.

episode_source_kind.description: Optional exact personal episode source kind filter

episode_title.description: Exact personal episode title for the personal-side episode route

kind.description: Optional map kind filter for the work-side route

map_id.description: Optional context map id for the work-side broad synthesis route

personal_route_kind.description: Personal-side route kind for the bridge

profile_type.description: Optional exact personal profile-memory type filter

requested_scope.description: Access scope override; must be mixed for this route. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

scope_id.description: Work-side scope id for broad synthesis (default: workspace:default)

subject.description: Exact personal profile subject for the personal-side profile route

operations.name: get_note_manifest_entry
operations.description: Read one derived note-manifest entry by slug for structural inspection.

operations.name: get_note_section_entry
operations.description: Get one derived note-section entry by scope and section id.

operations.name: get_note_structural_neighbors
operations.description: List deterministic structural neighbors for a page or section node.

operations.name: get_page
operations.description: Read a specific knowledge page by slug. Use after search or query returns a relevant slug. Pages contain compiled truth (current understanding) and timeline (evidence history).

compiled_truth_char_start.description: Optional compiled_truth character offset for paged reads.

content_char_limit.description: Optional max characters per content field. Use continuation selectors for the rest.

content_hash.description: Optional page content hash expected by continuation reads. Stale continuations return a structured stale_continuation result.

full_content.description: When true, ignore MCP/default content windowing and return full page content.

timeline_char_start.description: Optional timeline character offset for paged reads.

operations.name: get_personal_episode_entry
operations.description: Get one canonical personal-episode entry by id.

operations.name: get_personal_episode_lookup_route
operations.description: Resolve an exact personal episode route for personal/episode lookup intent.

query.description: Optional natural-language query for gate inference

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for gate enforcement. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

source_kind.description: Optional exact personal episode source kind filter

operations.name: get_personal_profile_lookup_route
operations.description: Resolve an exact personal profile-memory route for personal/profile lookup intent.

query.description: Optional natural-language query for gate inference

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for gate enforcement. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

operations.name: get_precision_lookup_route
operations.description: Resolve an exact canonical page or section route for precision lookup intent.

path.description: Exact canonical note path, optionally with #section/path fragment

operations.name: get_profile_memory_entry
operations.description: Get one canonical profile-memory entry by id.

operations.name: get_raw_data
operations.description: Retrieve raw data for a page

operations.name: get_skillpack
operations.description: Read the MBrain SKILLPACK reference architecture. Returns the full document or a specific section by number/name. Use this to learn detailed patterns for enrichment, meeting ingestion, cron schedules, and more.

section.description: Section number or keyword (e.g. "5", "enrichment", "meeting", "cron"). Omit to get the compact agent rules.

operations.name: get_source
operations.description: Inspect one persisted source registry record, policy, connector state, and status history.

operations.name: get_stats
operations.description: Brain statistics (page count, chunk count, etc.)

operations.name: get_tags
operations.description: List tags for a page

operations.name: get_task_working_set
operations.description: Get the canonical task thread and working-set state for one task.

operations.name: get_timeline
operations.description: Get timeline entries for a page

operations.name: get_versions
operations.description: Page version history

operations.description: Render a compact workspace corpus card from the current orientation bundle.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.description: Render a compact workspace orientation bundle from the current context-map report and cards.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: get_workspace_project_card
operations.description: Render a compact workspace project card from the current context-map report.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.description: Render a compact workspace system card from the current context-map report.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: ingest_connector_item
operations.description: Persist one connector item into raw source items and chunks without direct canonical writes.

body.description: Connector item body to map into raw ingest chunks.

connector_id.description: Connector registry id expected on the source.

now.description: Optional ISO ingest timestamp.

operations.name: list_canonical_handoff_entries
operations.description: List explicit canonical handoff records for auditability and downstream canonicalization.

target_object_type.description: Optional canonical handoff target type filter

operations.description: List canonical target proposals.

operations.name: list_context_atlas_entries
operations.description: List persisted atlas registry entries.

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter

operations.name: list_context_map_entries
operations.description: List persisted structural context map entries.

kind.description: Optional context-map kind filter

operations.name: list_memory_candidate_entries
operations.description: List canonical memory-inbox candidates.

operations.name: list_memory_candidate_review_backlog
operations.description: List a deduped memory-candidate review backlog without mutating stored candidates.

limit.description: Max backlog groups after dedup (default 20, cap 100)

operations.name: list_memory_candidate_status_events
operations.description: List append-only memory-candidate lifecycle status events.

scope_id.description: Optional candidate storage scope id filter (default omitted)

operations.name: list_memory_mutation_events
operations.description: List memory mutation ledger events. Read-only audit operation for import/repair and transactional-service observability.

operations.name: list_memory_realms
operations.description: List memory realms. Archived realms are excluded unless include_archived is true.

operations.name: list_memory_redaction_plans
operations.description: List memory redaction plans by scope or review/apply status.

operations.name: list_memory_session_attachments
operations.description: List memory realm attachments for sessions or realms.

operations.name: list_memory_sessions
operations.description: List memory sessions by effective status, task, actor, attached realm, or creation time window.

operations.name: list_note_manifest_entries
operations.description: List derived note-manifest entries for structural inspection.

operations.name: list_note_section_entries
operations.description: List derived note-section entries for structural inspection.

operations.description: List pages with optional filters

operations.name: list_personal_episode_entries
operations.description: List canonical personal-episode entries.

operations.name: list_profile_memory_entries
operations.description: List canonical profile-memory entries.

operations.name: list_retrievable_assertions
operations.description: List lifecycle-aware assertion retrieval plans: active answer-grounding, stale verify-first, audit-only history.

include_candidates.description: Include candidate assertions as verify-first plans.

include_rejected.description: Include rejected assertions as audit-only plans.

scope_id.description: Assertion retrieval scope id. Defaults to workspace:default.

operations.name: list_source_items
operations.description: List persisted raw source items and optional chunks for source/connector inspection.

include_chunks.description: Include source chunks for each item.

operations.name: list_sources
operations.description: List persisted source registry records with resolved policy and connector inspection state.

blocked_for_ingest.description: Optional filter for sources currently blocked from ingest.

locator_overlap.description: Optional file URL locator overlap filter.

operations.name: list_task_attempts
operations.description: List recorded attempts for one task thread.

operations.name: list_task_decisions
operations.description: List recorded decisions for one task thread.

operations.name: list_task_traces
operations.description: List retrieval traces for one task thread.

operations.name: list_tasks
operations.description: List task threads from canonical operational memory.

operations.name: log_ingest
operations.description: Log an ingestion event

operations.name: pause_source_processing
operations.description: Plan an auditable source pause transition for report-driven source repair workflows.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic status events.

operations.name: plan_agent_session_activation
operations.description: Plan authority-aware activation for future agent sessions using profile, episode, task, and candidate memory.

operations.description: Create a reviewed purge plan for due expired or archived lifecycle rows.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic planning.

scope_id.description: Lifecycle scope id; defaults to workspace:default.

operations.name: plan_retrieval_request
operations.description: Plan one or more retrieval route selections for a high-level request without executing them.

allow_decomposition.description: Allow deterministic decomposition into multiple route intents

episode_source_kind.description: Optional exact personal episode source kind filter for personal_episode_lookup planning

episode_title.description: Exact personal episode title for personal_episode_lookup planning

kind.description: Optional map kind filter for broad_synthesis planning

map_id.description: Optional context map id for broad_synthesis planning

path.description: Exact path for precision_lookup planning, optionally with #section/path fragment

persist_trace.description: Forwarded trace preference for planned selector inputs

personal_route_kind.description: Personal-side route kind for mixed_scope_bridge planning

profile_type.description: Optional exact profile-memory type filter for personal_profile_lookup planning

query.description: Query string for synthesis or signal inference

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for retrieval planning. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

scope_id.description: Scope id for planned route selection

section_id.description: Exact section id for precision_lookup planning

source_ref.description: Exact extracted source reference string for precision_lookup planning

subject.description: Exact profile-memory subject for personal_profile_lookup or mixed planning

task_id.description: Task id for task_resume decomposition or inference

operations.description: Plan scenario-aware memory reads, activation, next tool, and writeback hints without mutating memory.

known_subjects.description: Optional detected subject refs as strings or objects with ref and kind, or a JSON array string

query.description: Raw user request or system task

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for scenario memory planning. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

repo_path.description: Optional repository path associated with the session.

workspace_id.description: Optional workspace id associated with the session.

operations.name: preview_assertion_claim_extraction
operations.description: Preview Phase 03 extraction from one source chunk into extracted claims.

operations.name: preview_raw_canonical_document
operations.description: Render non-mutating canonical Markdown drafts from structured raw-source observations.

documents.description: Structured document draft requests, or a JSON array string for CLI usage.

extractor_version.description: Extractor version used before generating observations.

generator_version.description: Generator version to record in draft frontmatter.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic timeline draft entries.

parser_version.description: Parser version used before generating observations.

source_content_hash.description: Optional source item or raw content hash.

source_item_id.description: Optional source item id represented by the observations.

source_updated_at.description: Optional source-updated timestamp or version timestamp.

operations.name: preview_raw_ingest
operations.description: Build a raw source ingest provenance plan with chunk safety flags and raw-copy policy decisions.

extractor_version.description: Extractor version expected to consume chunks.

now.description: Optional ISO ingest timestamp.

origin_event.description: Origin event that produced this source item.

parser_version.description: Parser version used to produce chunks.

policy.description: Resolved source policy subset for raw ingest.

raw_text.description: Optional full raw text used for hashing/raw-copy decisions.

requested_raw_copy.description: Whether a full raw copy was requested.

operations.name: preview_source_registration
operations.description: Build a source registry record and initial append-only status event for minimal consent onboarding.

enabled.description: Whether the source should be enabled when consent is granted.

now.description: Optional ISO registration timestamp.

paused_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp when the source is paused.

operations.name: promote_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Promote one staged memory-inbox candidate after deterministic promotion preflight passes.

retry_on_stale.description: Retry once when duplicate review freshness changes before promotion

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for promotion metadata

operations.name: proof_agent_memory
operations.description: Run deterministic authority-first memory proof scenarios for agent use without mutating memory.

verbose.description: Include verbose memory-why fields in formatted output

operations.name: purge_lifecycle_memory
operations.description: Purge one due expired or archived lifecycle row, leaving a tombstone.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic purge.

scope_id.description: Lifecycle scope id; defaults to workspace:default.

operations.name: put_page
operations.description: Create or update a knowledge page to record new information about people, companies, concepts, or systems discovered during the conversation. Markdown with YAML frontmatter; content should follow the compiled truth + timeline pattern. Rejects generic, numeric-only, or globally bucketed documentation slugs. Chunks, embeds, and reconciles tags.

actor.description: Optional audit actor. Defaults to mbrain:put_page.

content.description: Full markdown content with YAML frontmatter

defer_derived.description: Commit the canonical page immediately and refresh chunks, manifest, and section indexes after the MCP response.

expected_content_hash.description: Optional optimistic write precondition. Existing page content_hash must match before writing; null requires that the page is absent.

memory_session_id.description: Optional memory session id used for write authorization. Requires realm_id.

realm_id.description: Optional audit realm id. Defaults to work.

repo.description: Optional markdown repo root for markdown-first local/offline writes. Defaults to configured markdown.repo_path or sync.repo_path.

scope_id.description: Optional audit scope id. Defaults to workspace:default.

session_id.description: Optional audit session id. Defaults to put_page:direct.

operations.name: put_raw_data
operations.description: Store raw API response data for a page

operations.name: query
operations.description: Semantic candidate discovery across MBrain. Use when the question is conceptual, cross-cutting, or keyword search missed likely pages; chunks are not answer evidence. For factual answers, call retrieve_context or read_context to load canonical evidence.

operations.name: query_context_map
operations.description: Run a bounded structural query over one persisted context map.

kind.description: Optional map kind filter when map_id is omitted

map_id.description: Optional context map id for a direct read

operations.name: rank_memory_candidate_entries
operations.description: Rank memory-inbox candidates deterministically for review ordering without mutating inbox state.

operations.name: read_candidate_context
operations.description: Read gated Memory Inbox candidate context with non-canonical authority labels.

audit_reason.description: Required audit reason for personal or unknown-sensitivity candidate context

purpose.description: Explicit reason for reading candidate content

requested_scope.description: Requested scope for sensitive candidate context

operations.name: read_context
operations.description: Read bounded canonical evidence for retrieval selectors. This is the evidence boundary before answering factual questions.

discovery.description: Core knowledge lookup: read_context reads canonical evidence for retrieval selectors and is the evidence boundary before factual answers.

include_source_refs.description: Include extracted source refs when available

include_timeline.description: Timeline inclusion mode: auto, include, or exclude. Use exclude to omit timeline text.
include_timeline.enum_error_hint: include_timeline controls returned timeline text; use exclude when timeline text should be omitted.

max_selectors.description: Maximum selectors to read before returning unread selectors

persist_trace.description: Persist a retrieval trace for this canonical read

query.description: Optional natural-language request for automatic reads

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for scope-gate enforcement. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

selectors.description: Retrieval selector objects, or a JSON array string for CLI usage

operations.name: rebuild_note_manifest
operations.description: Rebuild derived note-manifest entries from canonical page state.

slug.description: Optional slug to rebuild a single entry

operations.name: rebuild_note_sections
operations.description: Rebuild derived note-section rows from canonical page state.

page_slug.description: Optional slug to rebuild a single page

operations.name: record_attempt
operations.description: Record a task attempt outcome for repeated-work prevention.

operations.name: record_canonical_handoff
operations.description: Record one explicit canonical handoff row for a promoted memory candidate without mutating the canonical target.

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for handoff attribution

review_reason.description: Optional handoff review reason for auditability

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for handoff review metadata

operations.name: record_connector_failure
operations.description: Record a connector failure as source status history and connector sync health.

connector_id.description: Connector registry id expected on the source.

now.description: Optional ISO failure timestamp.

operations.name: record_connector_item_deletion
operations.description: Record a connector deletion/archive signal without silently purging retained raw ingest data.

connector_id.description: Connector registry id expected on the source.

now.description: Optional ISO event timestamp.

operations.name: record_connector_sync_success
operations.description: Record a completed connector sync with cursor progress and inspectable healthy sync state.

connector_id.description: Connector registry id expected on the source.

cursor_json.description: Connector cursor to use for the next incremental sync.

ingested_count.description: Number of items ingested or updated during this sync.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp when the sync finished.

skipped_count.description: Number of unchanged items skipped during this sync.

sync_started_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp when the sync started.

operations.name: record_decision
operations.description: Record a task decision and rationale.

operations.name: record_memory_mutation_event
operations.description: Privileged import/repair/transactional-service ledger recording only. This is not a normal user memory mutation write path and requires privileged: true plus privileged_reason.

dry_run.description: Preview recording without inserting a ledger event.

id.description: Optional ledger event id. Generated when omitted.

metadata.description: Additional event metadata. privileged_reason is added here.

mutation_dry_run.description: Whether the underlying memory mutation result being recorded was a dry run. Must match result=dry_run.

privileged.description: Must be true to make the privileged import/repair boundary explicit.

privileged_reason.description: Non-empty reason for privileged import/repair/transactional-service recording.

operations.name: record_personal_episode
operations.description: Record one append-only canonical personal-episode entry.

candidate_id.description: Optional linked candidate or profile id

end_time.description: Optional ISO timestamp for episode end

operations.name: record_retrieval_trace
operations.description: Record a retrieval trace for a task-scoped operational-memory flow.

derived_consulted.description: Derived artifacts consulted separately from canonical source refs

scope_gate_policy.description: Structured scope gate policy, when evaluated

scope_gate_reason.description: Structured scope gate reason, when evaluated

selected_intent.description: Structured retrieval intent selected for the trace

write_outcome.description: Structured write outcome for the trace

operations.name: refresh_task_working_set
operations.description: Refresh a task working set snapshot and advance its verification timestamp.

operations.name: register_connector_source
operations.description: Persist a connector-backed source choice, account, default grants, and sync health shell.

actor_ref.description: Actor that registered the connector source.

credential_ref.description: Optional credential reference metadata to persist without raw credential secrets.

now.description: Optional ISO registration timestamp.

operations.name: register_source
operations.description: Persist a source registry record and append-only minimal-consent status event.

enabled.description: Whether the source should be enabled when consent is granted.

now.description: Optional ISO registration timestamp.

paused_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp when the source is paused.

operations.name: reject_canonical_target_proposal
operations.description: Reject a canonical target proposal.

operations.name: reject_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Reject one staged memory-inbox candidate as an explicit governance outcome.

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for rejection metadata

operations.name: reject_memory_redaction_plan
operations.description: Reject a draft memory redaction plan.

operations.name: remove_link
operations.description: Remove link between pages

operations.name: remove_tag
operations.description: Remove tag from page

operations.name: rerun_memory_job
operations.description: Reset a failed maintenance or runner job to waiting and record the auditable rerun request.

job_id.description: Failed memory job id to rerun.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic planning.

operations.name: resolve_memory_candidate_contradiction
operations.description: Resolve one contradiction between a challenger candidate and an existing challenged candidate.

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for contradiction review metadata

operations.name: resolve_slugs
operations.description: Fuzzy-resolve a partial slug to matching page slugs

operations.name: resolve_source_policy
operations.description: Resolve source registry policy defaults, overrides, and processing gates for a source.

overrides.description: Advanced policy overrides keyed by policy dimension.

paused_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp when the source was paused.

operations.name: restore_lifecycle_memory
operations.description: Restore a stale, expired, or archived lifecycle row where policy allows.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic restore.

scope_id.description: Lifecycle scope id; defaults to workspace:default.

to_lifecycle_state.description: Restore target state: active or stale.

operations.name: resume_task
operations.description: Resume an operational-memory task thread from canonical task state.

operations.name: retrieve_context
operations.description: Agentic MBrain retrieval probe. Returns a bounded read_plan, required canonical reads, and non-canonical candidate_signals from Memory Inbox; chunks and candidate signals are not answer evidence. Call read_context on read_plan.selected_selector_snapshots before answering factual questions; use read_plan.selected_selectors only as a legacy selector-id fallback.

discovery.description: Core knowledge lookup: retrieve_context finds candidate context and required canonical reads. For factual answers, call read_context on read_plan.selected_selector_snapshots; read_plan.selected_selectors is a legacy fallback. If read_context is hidden, use tool_search for mbrain read_context.

graph_frontier.description: Explicit graph frontier selector planning flag. Default is off; graph paths are explanation-only.

include_push_context.description: Include a bounded selector-first push_context envelope; it contains no raw memory text and requires read_context before factual use.

known_subjects.description: Optional detected subject refs as strings or objects with ref and kind, or a JSON array string

persist_trace.description: Persist a retrieval trace for this probe

query.description: Raw user request or memory query

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for memory retrieval. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

selectors.description: Optional exact retrieval selector objects, or a JSON array string for CLI usage

operations.name: reverify_code_claims
operations.description: Re-check code path, symbol, and branch claims against the current workspace.

branch_name.description: Current branch name for branch-sensitive claims

claims.description: Code claims to verify directly, optionally including expected_content_hash, verification_hint, verification_mode, source_ref, and symbol_id

repo_path.description: Repository root used to verify file and symbol claims

trace_id.description: Retrieval trace id containing code_claim verification entries

operations.name: revert_version
operations.description: Revert page to a previous version

operations.name: review_duplicate_memory
operations.description: Review proposed or existing memory against near matches without mutating memory.

content.description: Subject content to compare against existing memory

include_candidates.description: Whether to include memory candidate matches (default true)

include_pages.description: Whether to include canonical page matches (default true)

source_refs.description: Optional provenance strings for match scoring

subject_id.description: Optional existing subject id to exclude from matches

operations.name: review_lifecycle_purge_plan
operations.description: Approve, reject, or cancel a reviewed lifecycle purge plan before destructive purge.

decision.description: Review decision for the purge plan.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic review.

purge_plan_id.description: Purge plan id returned by plan_lifecycle_purge.

operations.name: review_memory_patch_candidate
operations.description: Approve or reject a reviewable memory patch candidate without applying it to canonical memory.

realm_id.description: Active memory realm id attached read-write to the session

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for review metadata

risk_acknowledged.description: Required true when approving high or critical risk patch candidates

source_refs.description: Required provenance strings for the review decision

operations.name: revoke_source_consent
operations.description: Plan an auditable source consent revocation transition for report-driven source repair workflows.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp for deterministic status events.

operations.name: route_memory_writeback
operations.description: Route a possible durable memory writeback to a reviewable candidate or deferred/no-write decision.

allow_canonical_write.description: Whether the router may return canonical write requirements

apply.description: Create the routed memory candidate when the route decision allows it

content.description: Claim, observation, or proposed memory content to route

corpus_lane.description: Optional post-scope corpus lane provenance metadata

dry_run.description: Preview routing and candidate creation without mutating memory

evidence_kind.description: Evidence quality and writeback safety category

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

source_kind.description: Source kind for the writeback signal

source_refs.description: Provenance references for the writeback signal

target_snapshot_hash.description: Canonical target content_hash observed before routing; null asserts that the target is absent

operations.name: run_dream_cycle_maintenance
operations.description: Run bounded dream-cycle maintenance and emit candidate-only Memory Inbox suggestions.

derived_freshness_limit.description: Max derived context-map artifacts per family to inspect for freshness (default 50)

include_derived_freshness.description: Include a report-only scan of derived context-map freshness

now.description: Optional ISO datetime used for stale-claim checks

write_candidates.description: Create governed Memory Inbox suggestions. Default false; dry-run always false

operations.name: search
operations.description: Keyword candidate discovery across MBrain. Use for exact names, slugs, dates, and terms; chunks are not answer evidence. For factual answers, call retrieve_context or read_context to load canonical evidence.

operations.name: select_activation_policy
operations.description: Select how retrieved memory artifacts may affect a response.

artifacts.description: Activation artifacts as objects or a JSON array string

operations.name: select_context_atlas_entry
operations.description: Select the best persisted atlas registry entry for a scope.

allow_stale.description: Allow stale atlas entries when no fresh match exists

kind.description: Optional atlas kind filter

operations.name: select_personal_write_target
operations.description: Select the safe personal durable-memory target after scope-gate preflight.

query.description: Optional plain-text request used for scope classification

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for personal write-target selection. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

subject.description: Optional profile-memory subject when target_kind is profile_memory

title.description: Optional personal-episode title when target_kind is personal_episode

operations.name: select_retrieval_route
operations.description: Select one published retrieval route by explicit intent.

episode_source_kind.description: Optional exact personal episode source kind filter for personal_episode_lookup intent

episode_title.description: Exact personal episode title for personal_episode_lookup intent

intent.description: One of task_resume, broad_synthesis, precision_lookup, mixed_scope_bridge, personal_profile_lookup, personal_episode_lookup

kind.description: Optional map kind filter for broad_synthesis intent

map_id.description: Optional context map id for broad_synthesis intent

path.description: Exact path for precision_lookup intent, optionally with #section/path fragment

persist_trace.description: Persist a Retrieval Trace for the selected route; task_id is optional and task-less traces are stored with task_id=null

personal_route_kind.description: Personal-side route kind for mixed_scope_bridge intent

profile_type.description: Optional exact profile-memory type filter for personal_profile_lookup intent

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for route selection. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

scope_id.description: Scope id for delegated route selection

section_id.description: Exact section id for precision_lookup intent

source_ref.description: Exact extracted source reference string for precision_lookup intent

subject.description: Exact profile-memory subject for personal_profile_lookup intent

operations.name: start_task
operations.description: Create a new operational-memory task thread.

operations.name: supersede_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Record one explicit supersession outcome linking an older candidate to a newer promoted replacement.

interaction_id.description: Optional retrieval trace id for lifecycle event attribution

reviewed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for supersession metadata

operations.name: sync_brain
operations.description: Sync git repo to brain (incremental)

no_embed.description: Compatibility no-op: sync already defers embeddings

repo.description: Path to git repo (optional if configured)

operations.name: traverse_graph
operations.description: Traverse link graph from a page

operations.name: update_task
operations.description: Update canonical task-thread state for an existing task.

operations.name: upsert_memory_realm
operations.description: Create or update a memory realm for scoped memory access control.

archived_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp. Null reactivates an archived realm.

session_id.description: Optional mutation ledger session id. Generated when omitted.

source_refs.description: Optional provenance reference string or string array for the ledger event.

operations.name: upsert_profile_memory_entry
operations.description: Create or update one canonical personal profile-memory entry.

id.description: Optional profile-memory entry id (generated when omitted)

last_confirmed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for last confirmation

superseded_by.description: Optional id of a newer superseding entry

operations.name: verify_memory_candidate_entry
operations.description: Record a verification outcome (checked fact or refuted claim) with evidence on one active memory-inbox candidate.

verification_evidence.description: What was checked and what the check showed; required for auditability.

verification_method.description: How the claim was checked against ground truth.

verification_source_refs.description: Optional provenance strings for the verification itself (command output, file span, query).

verification_status.description: Verification outcome: verified turns the candidate into a checked fact; refuted blocks promotion.

verified_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for when the verification happened; defaults to now.

operations.name: write_personal_episode_entry
operations.description: Write one canonical personal-episode entry only after personal write-target preflight allows it.

candidate_id.description: Optional linked candidate or profile id

end_time.description: Optional ISO timestamp for episode end

query.description: Plain-text request used for personal write-target preflight

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for personal write preflight. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

operations.name: write_profile_memory_entry
operations.description: Write one canonical profile-memory entry only after personal write-target preflight allows it.

id.description: Optional profile-memory entry id (generated when omitted)

last_confirmed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for last confirmation

query.description: Plain-text request used for personal write-target preflight

requested_scope.description: Optional access scope override for personal write preflight. Use query for topical retrieval details.
requested_scope.enum_error_hint: requested_scope is the access scope; put retrieval details in query.

superseded_by.description: Optional id of a newer superseding entry
